pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: (("optimal load"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimal loading"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimum load"[Title/Abstract]) AND (exercise[Title/Abstract] OR training[Title/Abstract] OR sport*[Title/Abstract] OR "resistance training"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength training"[Title/Abstract])) AND (randomized controlled trial[pt] OR clinical trial[pt] OR meta-analysis[pt] OR systematic review[pt])
